name: Edgington Lane
description: Edgington Lane is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wheeling, WV. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Highlands Sports Complex
description: Highlands Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Triadelphia, WV. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and food.

name: Howard Long Wellness Center
description: The Wellness Center has indoor courts that have all the amenities.  The outdoor courts do not have the amenities.
fees: Fee required — Membership, Guests, Silver Sneakers

name: Oglebay Tennis Center
description: Oglebay Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Wheeling, WV. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, and lights. Reservations are not available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Ohio Valley Pickleball Club
description: Ohio Valley Pickleball Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Triadelphia, WV. There are 3 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, locker rooms, water, lights, trainers or lessons, and youth programming. A membership is required to play.
open_play_schedule: Schedule can be found on CourtReserve: https://app.courtreserve.com/Online/Reservations/Index/10024
fees: Members only — Membership information can be found on CourtReserve: https://app.courtreserve.com/Online/Portal/Index/10024

name: Pat's Pickleball Courts
description: Pat's Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Wheeling, WV. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: Wheeling Chambers YMCA
description: Wheeling Chambers YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Wheeling, WV. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.
